fragment_pulse.name: Fragment Pulse
fragment_pulse.description: Release a burst of unstable memory shards that strike in rapid succession.

pattern_rebind.name: Pattern Rebind
pattern_rebind.description: Reorganize the target’s active pattern, disrupting their accuracy and initiative.

memory_fracture.name: Memory Fracture
memory_fracture.description: Shatter a fragment of ancient data against the target, weakening their structure.

echo_archive.name: Echo Archive
echo_archive.description: Imprint a delayed echo of damage that triggers after a recursive interval.

recursive_seal.name: Recursive Seal
recursive_seal.description: Invoke an ancient Archive rite that binds the target in a looping seal.

loopbind_surge.name: Loopbind Surge
loopbind_surge.description: Strike with a surge of recursive force that momentarily locks the target’s actions.

glyph_first_loop.name: Glyph of the First Loop
glyph_first_loop.description: Channel a primordial Archive glyph that strengthens recursion-based techniques.

archive_lattice.name: Archive Lattice
archive_lattice.description: Weave a defensive lattice of ancient data strands to resist control effects.

data_rite_unspool.name: Data Rite: Unspool
data_rite_unspool.description: Perform a ritual that unravels the target’s active enhancements and weakens their next move.

special.name: SPECIAL
special.description: A hidden Archive rite reserved for future awakening.
